docs_archived.reason: One-time implementation analysis with no ongoing authority; kept in raw and recorded as completed work.

evidence_summary: Reconciled source, config, loop, Medic, types, finalize, and SmartDocs cognition for POL-516. Updated folder guidance and summaries to reflect run-health symptom reporting, Medic consult handling, SOL threshold-driven symptoms, and the finalize Medic gate. No docs were promoted or ingested, and link validation on all touched docs passed. The POL-515 analysis was archived as a completed one-time analysis with no ongoing authority.
